title: SEC Adopts Rules to Increase Transparency Among Private Funds
text: Per SEC's new rules to increase transparency, BX, CG, APO and KKR will have to issue quarterly fee and performance reports, and disclose fee structures.

title: KKR to Present at the Barclays Financial Services Conference
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE: KKR) announced today that Robert H. Lewin, Chief Financial Officer, will present at the Barclays Financial Services Conference on Monday, September 11, 2023 at 12:00 PM ET. A live webcast of the presentation will be available on the Investor Center section of KKR's website at https://ir.kkr.com/events-presentations/. For those unable to listen to the live webcast, a replay will be available on the website shortly after the event. Any question.

title: Italy signs preliminary deal with KKR to take up to 20% of TIM's grid
text: Italy's Treasury said on Thursday it had signed a preliminary agreement with U.S. fund KKR paving the way for the government to buy up to 20% of company that will own Telecom Italia's landline grid.

title: Quality 7%-14% Yields I Am Buying Hand-Over-Fist
text: High yield investing can be an extremely effective way to compound wealth over the long term. I share some of our favorite quality 7-14% yielding picks of the moment. I also share why high yield investing is such a great approach to long-term investing.

title: PE firm KKR acquires $373 mln portfolio of Synovus Bank's prime auto loans
text: Private equity giant KKR said on Tuesday it had acquired a $373 million portfolio of prime auto loans from Synovus Bank.

title: Italy, KKR discussing terms of state investment into fixed line grid - sources
text: Italy's Treasury and U.S. fund KKR are negotiating a memorandum of understanding (MoU) that would set the terms of a state-backed bid for Telecom Italia's (TIM) landline grid, two people familiar with the matter said.

title: Simon & Schuster purchased by private equity firm KKR for $1.62 billion
text: NEW YORK — Simon & Schuster has been sold to the private equity firm KKR KKR, +2.69%, months after a federal judge blocked its purchase by rival publisher Penguin Random House because of concerns that competition would shrink in the book market.

title: Simon & Schuster sold to private equity firm KKR for $1.62bn
text: Paramount Global has sold the publisher after a federal judge blocked rival Penguin Random House from buying it

title: Paramount to sell Simon & Schuster to KKR for $1.62 billion
text: Paramount Global has agreed to sell Simon & Schuster to private equity giant KKR for $1.62 billion, the company said as it reported quarterly earnings.

title: Paramount Selling Simon & Schuster To KKR For $1.62 Billion
text: Paramount's previous $2.2 billion deal to sell Simon & Schuster was struck down in 2022 following a lawsuit by the Department of Justice.

title: Paramount to Sell Simon & Schuster to KKR for $1.62 Billion
text: The sale of the book publisher to the buyout firm comes less than a year after previous deal with Penguin Random House was blocked.

title: KKR to Acquire Simon & Schuster from Paramount Global for $1.62 Billion
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Paramount Global (NASDAQ: PARA, PARAA) and KKR today announced the signing of a definitive agreement pursuant to which KKR will acquire Simon & Schuster for $1.62 billion in an all-cash transaction. "We are pleased to have reached an agreement on a transaction that delivers excellent value to Paramount shareholders while also positioning Simon & Schuster for its next phase of growth with KKR,” said Bob Bakish, President and CEO of Paramount Global. “The procee.

title: Paramount Global Near Deal To Sell Simon & Schuster To KKR
text: Paramount Global is close to announcing a sale of its publisher Simon & Schuster to private investment giant KKR, according to a person familiar with the situation. Timing is always fluid but a deal could be announced as early as today. Paramount will report second-quarter earnings this afternoon.

title: KKR & Co. Inc. (KKR) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Although the revenue and EPS for KKR & Co. Inc. (KKR) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: KKR & Co. Inc. Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE: KKR) today reported its second quarter 2023 results, which have been posted to the Investor Center section of KKR's website at https://ir.kkr.com/events-presentations/. A conference call to discuss KKR's financial results will be held today, Monday, August 7, 2023 at 10:00 a.m. ET. title: KKR in 'advanced talks' to buy Paramount's Simon & Schuster in $1.65 Billion deal: Report
text: KKR & Co Inc is in advanced talks to acquire book publisher Simon & Schuster from Paramount Global for $1.65 billion, according to the Wall Street Journal.

title: Private-Equity Firm KKR in Advanced Talks to Buy Simon & Schuster for Roughly $1.65 Billion
text: Book publisher was put up for sale for the second time after a judge blocked a previous deal with Penguin Random House.

title: KKR in advanced talks to buy Simon & Schuster for $1.65 bln-source
text: KKR & Co Inc is in advanced talks to acquire book publisher Simon & Schuster from Paramount Global for $1.65 billion, according to a person familiar with the matter.
